title: Saturated Plastics
description: More saturated textures for PneumaticCraft's plastic blocks
body:
### This is a Resource Pack for mod [PneumaticCraft: Repressurized](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized)

This Resource Pack provides custom textures for Plastic Brick blocks from PneumaticCraft: Repressurized that were made using gradient mapping.

As a bonus, it also provides textures for Plastic Brackets from [Compressed Creativity](https://modrinth.com/mod/compressedcreativity/)!

#### Default look
![](https://i.imgur.com/WlGAFhQ.png "")

#### With this resource pack
![](https://i.imgur.com/9eKFmSh.png "")
